scripts.test:session: tsx -e "import assert from 'node:assert/strict'; import { isSameOriginMutation, validToken } from './lib/web-session.ts'; assert.equal(validToken('abc', 3), true); const same = new Request('https://suqnaa.com/api/state', { method: 'POST', headers: { origin: 'https://suqnaa.com' } }); assert.equal(isSameOriginMutation(same, true), true); const missing = new Request('https://suqnaa.com/api/state', { method: 'POST' }); assert.equal(isSameOriginMutation(missing, true), false);"
